---
title: "WSI morphological and graph topological features extraction"
description: "Extract morphological features from WSI, compute the associated Delaunay graph and extract topological features from it. Presented at SPIE Medical Image 2023 conference."
author:
  - name: Pablo Mas
    url: https://github.com/stratifIAD/graph_topology
    # orcid: 0000-0002-5300-3075
    affiliation: Research intern at Inria / ICM
date: 02-14-2023
categories: [Python] # self-defined categories
image: graph-topology.png
draft: false # setting this to `true` will prevent your post from appearing on your listing page until you're ready!
---
